---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: yeti
    sansfont: Georgia
    df_print: paged
    Highlight: Tango
    
    css: styles.css


---

<br>
<br>

<h1>**Tyler Young**</h1>
<h6>Creativity, Data Science & Prioritization for a Greater Good.
</h6>
<h6>
***B.S. Environmental Studies - University of Oregon***  
***M.S. Data Analytics - Arizona State***
</h6><h5>
<br>
**Currently:**
</h5>
<h6>
**Growatt USA, North American Marketing Manager**  
[us.Growatt.com](https://US.growatt.com)
  
</h6>
Social:
*
[Youtube](http://youtube.com/tylerisyoung/?target=_blank) , 
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tylerisyoung/?target=_blank) ,
[Twitter](https://www.twitter.com/Tylerisyoung/?target=_blank) ,
[GitHub](https://www.github.com/tylerisyoung/?target=_blank) ,
[Substack](https://tylerisyoung.substack.com/people/8775252-tylerisyoung) , 
[Email](mailto:Tyleralexanderyoung@gmail.com/?target=_blank])
*
 
________________________________________

<br>

<h5>
**My name is Tyler. I work in the energy industry, and things are getting interesting! Read one of my latest articles or watch one of my films, and welcome to the fugaze!** 
</h5>

<br>
<br>


![](images/surf.jpg)


<h6>
***This website was coded by Tyler Young in R, more info on Github.***
</h6>





<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<center>
![](images/tylerisyounglogo_small_tiny_2.png)










</a>
</div>
